description: This file defines the React context and provider for managing global application state related to notes, tags, filters, and loading status in a note-taking frontend application.

methods.name: useAppContext
methods.description: Custom hook to access the app context, ensuring it is used within an AppContextProvider.

methods.name: AppContextProvider
methods.description: React component that provides global state for notes, tags, filters, and loading status to its child components.
